title: aeschynanthus tubiflorus
intro: Aeschynanthus tubiflorus, also known as the lipstick plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus tubiflorus include its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas or infusions, and it can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
